day_trace.speech: Oops, everyone is awake again! Xunwan is so quiet and weird, everyone is surprised by this "Fang Tangjing" of mine? Ha ha! However, although Xingwan seems to be calm and peaceful, as a person who is extremely sensitive to the stage, I can already smell the smell of gunpowder! Blaze, what "new discoveries" are you making in the evening? ConspiBro, has your "imaginary cage" system been upgraded again? Don't wait any longer, please report it quickly to see what "scenery" you will see tonight. The game will be more exciting and exciting! Ha ha ha ha!

day_trace.speech: Twister, you're an actor, what are you doing? The whole group of people woke up early in the morning and were pretending to be mysterious and leading the wind. It was really a fire! ConspiBro, a fellow conspiracy theorist, talks about some unknown "card codes" here. Today we have the same goal. If the other person acts mysterious and leads the way, I will be the first to die! Tell me your true identity quickly, before you make me angry!

ConspiBro, a fellow conspiracy theorist, talks about some unknown "card codes" here. Today we have the same goal. If the other person acts mysterious and leads the way, I will be the first to die! Blaze’s grumpiness, SafetySam’s off-the-wall tone, and Twister’s playful direction are all designed to disrupt our monitoring of hole card data! PHD, are you still taking inventory? I will definitely debunk this scene!

day_trace.speech:
Logical inventory and elimination procedures:
1. Abnormal identification: There is a huge logical paradox in the current game narrative. EasyBake claims to have discovered the identity of Blaze's minions, while Blaze strongly accuses SafetySam, and the paths of all parties are conflicting.
2. Reconciliation requirements:
